objective: Close F-0128 by moving employee-statistics page selection, stable employeeDisplayName plus employeePublicId ordering, distinct employee count and answer-row narrowing into the PostgreSQL repository path. Preserve the existing organization scope, date range, advanced-admin authorization and summary-only privacy contract without schema, migration, persistent database execution or UI behavior changes.
blockedFiles: schema, migration or persistent database execution
organization analytics authorization or privacy expansion
raw employee answers, personal AI content or export
Provider, external service, secret/env, deployment, PR or force-push

authoritativeChainEvidence.uiApi: AdminOrganizationAnalyticsPage already sends page/pageSize and renders the returned pagination. No UI contract change is required.
authoritativeChainEvidence.routeService: The employee-statistics route resolves the existing org_advanced_admin context and visible organization scope before repository access. The service currently asks for every employee summary input and slices in memory; it must consume one repository page and its distinct total instead.
authoritativeChainEvidence.repository: The runtime repository currently loads every submitted organization_training_answer row in the visible scope/date range without order, count, limit or offset. The corrected path pages distinct employees by employeeDisplayName and employeePublicId, counts with the same predicate, then loads submissions only for the selected employee ids.
authoritativeChainEvidence.schema: Existing organization_training_answer.employee_public_id, employee/user joins, organization_public_id, status and submitted_at support the correction. No schema or migration source is required.
authoritativeChainEvidence.tests: Focused RED proves row/count predicate identity, stable same-name ordering, 21/51/101 employee windows, page-scoped submission loading and truthful service pagination. Existing repository/service/route/UI regressions are pre-allowlisted.
authoritativeChainEvidence.requirements: Advanced organization analytics module and employee-answer-statistics story require summary-only scoped analytics, stable 20/50/100 pagination and no raw answers/export. ADR-007 keeps the advanced authorization source unchanged.
authoritativeChainEvidence.nonClaims: No entitlement, scope, privacy, schema, migration, real database, UI, export, Provider, dependency, deployment or mechanism change.
